title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (e) PAGE ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE, SECTION TWO-43 (QUEZON) OF ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUN-ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5009 / 52 OG No. 7, 3533 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1467, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM (e) PAGE ONE HUNDRED TWENTY-FIVE, SECTION TWO-43 (QUEZON) OF ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUN-ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (

e

), page one hundred twenty-five, section two-43 (Quezon) of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"e-1. Candelaria Public Market premises,

Asphalting and canalizationรขยยฆ...................... 5,000.00

"e-2. Masalakot Barrio Road, Candelaria,

Repairรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆ......................รขยยฆ......... 3,000.00

"e-3. Sta. Catalina Barrio Road,

Candelaria, Repairรขยยฆรขยยฆรขยยฆ......................... 1,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
